evals.name: Stock Analysis Verification
evals.description: Verify stock analysis quality and accuracy
expectations: CMP (Current Market Price) is present and matches real market data (within 2%)
P/E ratio is present and mathematically consistent with EPS and CMP
Technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Moving Averages) are present with actual values
Support and resistance levels are identified with ₹ values
Bull case and bear case scenarios are both presented (not just one-sided)
Stop loss is defined with specific ₹ value
Risk:Reward ratio is calculated and makes mathematical sense
Final recommendation (BUY/SELL/HOLD) is justified by the analysis
At least one challenger/contrarian view is included
Data sources are real and verifiable (not hallucinated)
